options.D: Her tuition payment is overdue

questions.explanation: 男士查账户后发现她的会员资格月初就失效了，因为现在每学期要主动续费，故B正确。A错误：问题在账户不在闸机扫描器，属误读。C错误：他没说卡本身过期或是旧卡，是会员资格没续，属错误细节。D错误：他说政策变了不再随学费自动续费，但没说学费逾期，属未提及。

questions.stem: What does the man recommend the woman do?

options.A: Renew her membership on the website
options.B: Pay the renewal fee at the front desk
options.C: Wait for the card to reactivate on its own
options.D: Report the broken turnstile to staff

questions.explanation: 男士说虽然能在前台续费，但网上更便宜，建议用手机在网站续费，两分钟就好且卡立即生效，故A正确。B错误：他说前台可以但网上更便宜，更推荐网上，前台是次选，属被否决的方向。C错误：卡不会自动重新激活，需要主动续费，属过度推断。D错误：闸机没坏，问题在会员资格，属无关下一步。

items.situation: a student asks health-center staff how to get a copy of her vaccination records for a study-abroad program

conversation.speaker: Woman
conversation.text: Hi, my study-abroad program needs an official copy of my vaccination records. How do I get one from the health center?

conversation.speaker: Man
conversation.text: Sure. You can request them through the patient portal, under 'Medical Records.' We email an official PDF within about three days.

conversation.speaker: Woman
conversation.text: Three days? My program needs them by Monday, and it's already Thursday.

conversation.speaker: Man
conversation.text: Cutting it close. In that case, fill out a records-release form here at the desk and mark it 'expedited.' Then we can have it ready by tomorrow afternoon.

conversation.speaker: Woman
conversation.text: Oh, that's much better. Where do I get the form?

conversation.speaker: Man
conversation.text: I'll hand you one right now. Just fill it out, and you can pick up the records tomorrow after three.

questions.stem: How does the man say records are normally delivered through the portal?

options.A: As a printed copy mailed home
options.B: As an official PDF sent by email
options.C: As a fax to the study-abroad office
options.D: As a link texted to the student's phone

questions.explanation: 男士说通过患者门户申请，他们会在三天内发一份官方PDF邮件，故B正确。A错误：他说的是邮件发PDF，不是邮寄纸质件回家，属错误细节。C错误：对话从未提到传真给留学办公室，属虚构方式。D错误：没提到短信发链接，属未提及的细节。

questions.stem: What will the woman most likely do next?

options.A: Wait three days for the portal email
options.B: Ask her program to extend the deadline
options.C: Mail a request to the health center
options.D: Fill out an expedited release form at the desk

questions.explanation: 男士说因为周一就要、时间紧，建议在前台填加急的记录调取表，明天下午就能取，并说马上给她表格，故D正确。A错误：三天太慢赶不上周一，她不会等门户邮件，属被否决的选项。B错误：对话从未提到请项目方延期，属无关下一步。C错误：加急方案是当面填表，不是邮寄申请，属误读细节。

items.situation: a student asks financial-aid staff whether taking fewer credits will affect her grant eligibility

conversation.speaker: Woman
conversation.text: Hi, I'm thinking of dropping to nine credits next term to lighten my load. Will that affect the grant I'm getting?

conversation.speaker: Man
conversation.text: It might. Your grant requires you stay enrolled full-time, which is twelve credits. At nine, you'd drop to part-time and the grant could be reduced or cut.

conversation.speaker: Woman
conversation.text: Oh, I had no idea it was tied to the credit count.

conversation.speaker: Man
conversation.text: It is. But before you panic, there's a half-time exception for certain grants. Some still pay a reduced amount at six to eleven credits. It depends on which grant you have.

conversation.speaker: Woman
conversation.text: I'm honestly not sure which one it is. How do I find out?

conversation.speaker: Man
conversation.text: Bring me your award letter and I'll look up the exact terms. Don't drop any credits until we've confirmed it, okay?

questions.stem: What is the woman mainly concerned about?

options.A: Whether reducing her credits will affect her grant
options.B: Whether she can graduate a semester early
options.C: Whether her tuition bill has been paid
options.D: Whether she qualifies for a new scholarship

questions.explanation: 女士开门见山问把学分降到九分会不会影响她拿的助学金，全程围绕学分与助学金的关系，故A正确。B错误：她是想'减轻负担'而非提前毕业，属误读情境。C错误：对话从未提到学费账单是否已付，属无关话题。D错误：她关心的是现有助学金会不会受影响，不是申请新奖学金，属无关话题。

questions.stem: What does the man advise the woman to do?

options.A: Immediately drop to nine credits
options.B: Switch to a different grant program
options.C: Bring her award letter before changing credits
options.D: Apply for a part-time student loan

questions.explanation: 男士让她把奖助通知书(award letter)拿来核对具体条款，并叮嘱'确认之前别减任何学分'，故C正确。A错误：他明确说确认前不要减学分，立刻降到九分与建议相反，属被否决的选项。B错误：他说要看她是哪种助学金，没建议换助学金项目，属过度推断。D错误：对话从未提到申请贷款，属无关下一步。
